rows.label: tlk70000051_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Hey, you lot. Have you
ever found a Secret Area?

rows.label: tlk70000051_01_msg0002
rows.name:
They're not easy to find,
but when you do, the sight
is truly astounding.

rows.label: tlk70000051_01_msg0003
rows.name:
It may be a grand view, or
perhaps ancient ruins. It
depends on the Divine Beast.

rows.label: tlk70000051_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Secret Areas are pretty great.
I've never seen one myself, like.
Always wanted to. Imagine it!

rows.label: tlk70000051_01_msg0005
rows.name:
Bet you could dine out on that story
for life. Just think how many drinks
people'd buy you to hear it.
